this can happen before *or after* the agent has finished processing a given message.
AgentCrashedRunnerMessage.title: AgentCrashedRunnerMessage

AgentMessageSource.description: Messages can come from the AGENT (in-container LLM), USER (chat messages & direct interactions), SCULPTOR_SYSTEM (multifaceted sculptor app and service code) and RUNNER (the process controlling a task on the server.)

BackgroundTaskNotificationAgentMessage.description:
Emitted when a background task completes.

The assistant turn that follows this message is a response to the background task
completion, not a continuation of the previous conversation. message_conversion uses
this to separate the background response into its own chat message.

This is persistent (not ephemeral) because the separation must survive page reloads.
The entire background notification cycle (system/task_notification → system/init →
assistant streaming → result/success) happens within a single RequestStarted/
RequestSuccess pair, so without this persisted marker the background response would
be concatenated with the preceding assistant message on replay.
BackgroundTaskNotificationAgentMessage.title: BackgroundTaskNotificationAgentMessage

SetModelUserMessage.description:
Switch the running agent's model out-of-band (the pi `set_model` path).

Persistent like `ClearContextUserMessage` so the harness picks it up through
the task runner and runs it between turns. Carries the `(provider, model_id)`
of the chosen `ModelOption`; the pi adapter issues pi's `set_model` RPC and,
on success, updates the persisted current model. Claude never receives this —
its model rides each turn as `ChatInputUserMessage.model_name`.

approximateCreationTime.description: Approximate UTC timestamp when user message was created
approximateCreationTime.title: Approximatecreationtime

messageId.description: Unique identifier for the user message
messageId.title: Messageid

SetModelUserMessage.title: SetModelUserMessage

autoCompactThreshold.description: Threshold at which auto-compaction fires (denominator for the percent display)
autoCompactThreshold.title: Autocompactthreshold

changedFiles.description: File paths changed during this turn (git-relative, all tools including Bash)
changedFiles.title: Changedfiles

contextTotalTokens.description: Total tokens in the context window at turn end (None if unavailable)
contextTotalTokens.title: Contexttotaltokens

inputTokens.description: Input tokens for this turn (None when interrupted before completion)
inputTokens.title: Inputtokens

outputTokens.description: Output tokens for this turn (None when interrupted before completion)
outputTokens.title: Outputtokens

TurnMetrics.title: TurnMetrics

TurnMetricsAgentMessage.description:
Emitted by the output processor at the end of a turn with per-turn metrics.

Always arrives on the queue before the corresponding RequestSuccessAgentMessage
or RequestStoppedAgentMessage, so message_conversion can attach it to the
in-progress chat message before finalizing the request.

Persistent so that metrics survive server restarts and are available during
historical message replay.
TurnMetricsAgentMessage.title: TurnMetricsAgentMessage

planFilePath.description: Absolute path of the plan file the agent wrote in this turn, when the question is the synthesized ExitPlanMode approval. Set by `make_plan_approval_question` and consumed by the frontend ExitPlanMode tool block to render a click-to-reopen link. None for non-plan-approval questions or when the agent didn't write a plan file in the current turn (e.g. re-using a plan from a prior turn).
planFilePath.title: Planfilepath

messageId.title: Messageid

notes.description: Map from question text to the freeform 'Other' text the user typed, when present. Mirrors the native AskUserQuestion tool's per-question `notes` annotation, which the result formatter renders as ` user notes: <text>` after the answer string.

AgentTaskStateV2.description:
The state of a run_agent server task.
This is used to snapshot the state of the task at various points in time so that the agent can be resumed.
AgentTaskStateV2.title: AgentTaskStateV2

NoOpTaskStateV1.description: Test-only task state paired with NoOpTaskInputsV1.
NoOpTaskStateV1.title: NoOpTaskStateV1

SerializedException.description: A serializable dataclass that represents an exception
SerializedException.title: SerializedException

RegisteredTerminalAgentConfig.description:
A terminal agent that launches a registered program in its shell.

Launch parameters are stamped at creation from the registration so the
task stays self-describing even if the registration file later changes.
RegisteredTerminalAgentConfig.title: RegisteredTerminalAgentConfig

AgentTaskInputsV2.description:
The primary task for running an agent.

Contains the necessary information for the task runner.

The `agent_config` is used to configure the `Agent` itself. It contains the full (versioned) command to be run.
The `git_hash` records the starting commit for diff computation.
AgentTaskInputsV2.title: AgentTaskInputsV2

MustBeShutDownTaskInputsV1.description: Used in testing to make sure we can shut down tasks that do nothing but wait.
MustBeShutDownTaskInputsV1.title: MustBeShutDownTaskInputsV1

NoOpTaskInputsV1.description:
Test-only task input that runs a no-op handler and completes immediately.

Used by the task-service tests to exercise the non-agent task path.
NoOpTaskInputsV1.title: NoOpTaskInputsV1
